prompt:
Reference image role: the previous Megatron project cover defines the style — dark ink-green base, right-side glowing tech motif, left-side quiet for text overlay, restrained Eastern xianxia + tech fusion. Same color palette, same mood.

Create a 16:9 project cover image for "PyTorch Custom Collective / AllReduce". NO text, NO logos.

Subject: A glowing concentric ring/vortex on the right — multiple thin gold rings rotating around a central firefly cyan core, with curved flow-lines spiraling inward from all directions (suggesting collective communication and AllReduce). Tiny luminous node points distributed evenly on each ring. Background fades to dark with subtle network-like dots in deep teal.

Composition: vortex subject on right 60%, left 40% dark and quiet. Cinematic, professional, NOT game UI.

Color HEX: base #0B211D, glow #9CF0BD, gold #C0A35D, jade #6A9580, dark teal #18483E.

Avoid: company logos, readable text, characters, neon purple, red, cartoonish, MMORPG, oversaturated.
